ZSWIM8-6.方向标题: AMPK-TDMD feedback: energy stress triggers miRNA degradation in T2D metabolic memory
ZSWIM8-6.核心问题: Does AMPK phosphorylate ZSWIM8 or its AGO2-interacting partners during nutrient starvation, and does this TDMD-based miRNA recycling sustain metabolic reprogramming in T2D myofibers and β-cells, reversibly?
ZSWIM8-6.Why now: AMPK is his metabolic expertise center; T2D pig model is available; ZSWIM8 phospho-sites are unknown—unexplored mechanistic question; lactate/cholesterol/glycolytic feedback loops are partly miRNA-driven, creating a directly testable integrative model.
ZSWIM8-6.连接你的研究: Laser-focused on his core metabolic-signaling strength (AMPK, lactate, energy stress); T2D pig model is directly applicable; mechanism connects 'metabolism → miRNA turnover → disease memory,' filling a gap at the intersection of two under-explored areas.

ZSWIM8-1.方向标题: Lactate-driven TDMD in intestinal epithelial stress and fibrosis
ZSWIM8-1.核心问题: Does lactate-induced histone lactylation reprogram ZSWIM8-AGO2 recruitment and trigger-RNA specificity during intestinal epithelial injury, linking metabolic signaling to miRNA-mediated fibroblast activation?
ZSWIM8-1.Why now: Lactylation enzymatic basis is now mapped (ACLY, HDAC11); intestinal organoid systems enable compartment-specific metabolic control; SAA3-driven fibrosis mechanistically incomplete—TDMD offers a fresh axis coupling energetic stress to tissue remodeling.
ZSWIM8-1.连接你的研究: Directly integrates his T2D-pig and IBD/SAA3 fibrosis models; leverages organoid expertise; tests lactate/AMPK signaling—his core metabolic strength—as a TDMD regulator, filling mechanistic gap in fibrosis pathogenesis.

TUT4_7-3.方向标题: SAA3-driven intestinal fibrosis: miRNA tailing as a checkpoint for inflammatory-miRNA export and TDMD
TUT4_7-3.核心问题: Does SAA3-induced stress trigger aberrant TUT4/7-dependent oligouridylation of pro-fibrotic miRNAs (e.g., miR-29, miR-192), blocking their export and trapping them in lysosomes for DIS3L2 degradation, and can blocking uridylation suppress fibrosis?
TUT4_7-3.Why now: IBD fibrosis is a clinical unmet need; Sheldon has SAA3-IBD intestinal organoids; oligouridylation-driven sequestration is unstudied; gut-lumen miRNA biology is an explicit gap—intestinal organoids allow compartment-specific interrogation.
TUT4_7-3.连接你的研究: IBD/SAA3-fibrosis model (hands-on), intestinal organoids (technique), oligouridylation-lysosomal routing (gap), small-RNA-seq (method). Direct path to therapeutic screens.

ZSWIM8-3.方向标题: Muscle stem-cell miRNA recycling in DMD: TDMD vs. canonical AGO2 turnover
ZSWIM8-3.核心问题: In DMD myogenic progenitors, does ZSWIM8-TDMD preferentially target pro-fibrotic or pro-inflammatory miRNAs, and does blocking TDMD-nucleases preserve myogenic capacity better than global AGO stabilization?
ZSWIM8-3.Why now: DMD is a hands-on disease model for him; miRNA-sequencing infrastructure is native to Lai lab; TDMD mechanisms in stem-cell fate choice are unexplored; MYBPC3-cardiac fibrosis model suggests fibrosis-miRNA logic translates across muscle subtypes.
ZSWIM8-3.连接你的研究: Bridges DMD (his hands-on model) and cardiac fibrosis expertise; small-RNA-seq is core lab tool; mechanism addresses DMD pathology (myogenic exhaustion + fibrosis) via a metabolically-grounded axis (lactate in dystrophic muscle is elevated).

TARBP2-2.方向标题: TRBP substrate selectivity in DMD muscle: miR-dysregulation of autophagy suppressors
TARBP2-2.核心问题: How does DMD-induced energetic stress reprogram TRBP recognition of muscle-enriched pre-miRNAs (miR-1, miR-206, miR-29), and do TRBP mutations bias miRNA processing toward variants that impair autophagy-lysosomal clearance of damaged myofibrils?
TARBP2-2.Why now: miR-206/miR-1 roles in muscle regeneration established (2015+); autophagy dysfunction central to DMD pathology; substrate specificity of dsRBPs explicitly named as gap; base/prime editing enables precise TRBP-targeting in muscle tissue.
TARBP2-2.连接你的研究: DMD pig/mouse model + base editing expertise; muscle-specific miRNA network interrogation; mechanistic link to metabolic stress (AMPK, energy depletion) he knows well.

TUT4_7-2.方向标题: Target-directed miRNA decay in DMD: DIS3L2 recruitment by dystrophin-associated ribonucleoproteins
TUT4_7-2.核心问题: Do dystrophin-associated proteins (DAPs) scaffold TDMD-liberated miRNA capture by DIS3L2 at the sarcolemma, and can prime-editing restore this compartment-specific degradation pathway in DMD myotubes?
TUT4_7-2.Why now: DMD lacks RNA-level interventions; prime editing is now routine in his lab (Lai reagents); DIS3L2 compartmentalization is a recognized gap; DAPs are a new angle—no prior work on DAP–TDMD crosstalk.
TUT4_7-2.连接你的研究: DMD model (hands-on), prime editing (technique), TDMT mechanistic gap (factor). Myotubes + organoids allow spatial proteomics + CLIP-lite validation.

TARBP2-4.方向标题: TRBP-MYBPC3 feedforward: cardiac fibrosis via selectively impaired miR-21 biogenesis
TARBP2-4.核心问题: Does MYBPC3 truncation dysregulate TRBP localization or stoichiometry, causing context-dependent loss of miR-21 maturation and paradoxical fibrotic expansion despite miR-21's known pro-fibrotic role—reversible by restoring TRBP–DGCR8 interaction?
TARBP2-4.Why now: MYBPC3 cardiac fibrosis model established in Zou's prior work; miR-21 dysregulation in cardiomyopathy documented (2015+); substrate-specificity gaps make this a mechanistic frontier; CRISPR base editing enables isoform-selective MYBPC3 rescue.
TARBP2-4.连接你的研究: MYBPC3 cardiac fibrosis/hypertrophy model + base editing; systemic metabolic signaling (cholesterol, energy stress in failing heart); Lai-lab TRBP tools directly applicable.

DGCR8-5.方向标题: DGCR8 phosphorylation by AMPK couples energy stress to miRNA-mediated metabolic adaptation
DGCR8-5.核心问题: Does direct AMPK-catalyzed phosphorylation of DGCR8 at conserved S/T sites enhance miRNA biogenesis of energy-homeostasis clusters (e.g., miR-122, miR-143/145), and is this axis defective in T2D and DMD metabolic failure?
DGCR8-5.Why now: AMPK kinase specificity & substrate phospho-sites are fully mapped; AMPK is mainstream in metabolism & disease but its direct transcriptome outputs via miRNA are understudied; Sheldon has T2D & DMD models with metabolic readouts and Lai-lab phospho-site screening tools.
DGCR8-5.连接你的研究: T2D pig + DMD mouse models with metabolic phenotyping, AMPK-expertise in metabolism, DGCR8 phosphomutant constructs (S→A and S→D), small-RNA-seq to track metabolic-stress miRNA shifts.

TUT4_7-1.方向标题: Lactate-driven miRNA uridylation in metabolic reprogramming
TUT4_7-1.核心问题: How does lactate-dependent histone lactylation regulate TUT4/7 recruitment and substrate selectivity during glycolytic shift, and does this axis control miRNA stability in T2D adipose/muscle?
TUT4_7-1.Why now: Lactylation is emerging as a metabolic rheostat (HDAC inhibitors + lactate feed-forward); Sheldon has unpublished lactate/AMPK data in T2D pigs; TUT4/7 substrate selectivity remains mechanistically opaque—lactylation of TUT regulatory proteins is unstudied.
TUT4_7-1.连接你的研究: T2D pig model (metabolic readout), lactate/energy-stress signaling (his strengths), TUT4/7 miRNA tailing (factor), small-RNA-seq (technique). Can use pig adipose/muscle organoids for validation.

AGO2-3.方向标题: tRF-AGO2 sorting into SAA3-regulated fibrosis EVs
AGO2-3.核心问题: In IBD and inflammatory fibrosis, does SAA3-driven intestinal epithelial stress selectively load stress-responsive tRFs into AGO2-containing extracellular vesicles, and do recipient cells interpret these tRFs as pro-fibrotic signals via distinct AGO-partner proteins?
AGO2-3.Why now: EV-miRNA delivery is established, but tRF EV-loading mechanisms and AGO selectivity in packaging are open (gap on tRF-AGO regulation); intestinal organoids + small-RNA-seq + SAA3 model allow direct dissection of epithelial→immune→fibroblast signaling axis.
AGO2-3.连接你的研究: IBD/SAA3 intestinal fibrosis model + intestinal organoids + small-RNA-seq + existing knowledge of lactate-SAA3 crosstalk. Mechanistic, disease-anchored, publishable at scale.

TARBP2-3.方向标题: TRBP dysregulation in SAA3-driven intestinal fibrosis: miRNA-mediated TGF-β pathway amplification
TARBP2-3.核心问题: Does SAA3-induced TRBP upregulation selectively enhance processing of fibrosis-suppressive miRNAs (miR-29, let-7) while reducing processing of pro-fibrotic competitors, and can targeted TRBP degradation or TRBP-DGCR8 disruption rebalance this axis in IBD organoid models?
TARBP2-3.Why now: SAA3 biology in IBD now characterized (2018+); miR-29 as anti-fibrotic conserved; intestinal organoid systems enable high-throughput miRNA profiling; prime editing allows reversible TRBP modulation without permanent knockdown.
TARBP2-3.连接你的研究: IBD/SAA3-driven fibrosis model is his disease anchor; intestinal organoid expertise + small-RNA-seq; metabolic signaling (lactate/cholesterol in inflamed epithelium) intersects fibrosis initiation.

TARBP2-6.方向标题: TRBP post-translational modification cascade: lactylation-driven substrate selectivity in metabolic disease
TARBP2-6.核心问题: Which lactylation sites on TRBP control its binding affinity to specific pre-miRNAs or DGCR8, and do AMPK-regulated lysine acetyltransferases create disease-context-dependent TRBP conformers that bias miRNA maturation toward metabolic-stress-response gene networks?
TARBP2-6.Why now: Lysine lactylation of RNA binders emerging (2021+); AMPK signaling framework well-established; TRBP structure not fully mapped (gap exploit); Lai-lab constructs enable rapid structure-function screening; LC-MS/MS sites mappable in disease tissues.
TARBP2-6.连接你的研究: Core expertise in lactate/AMPK/energy stress + metabolic signaling; T2D and DMD models; mechanistic depth (PTM-driven selectivity) aligns with his molecular mechanism strength; substrate specificity gap directly addressed.

TUT4_7-5.方向标题: Cholesterol-dependent TUT4/7 regulation in MSI gastric cancer via SREBP signaling
TUT4_7-5.核心问题: Does cholesterol scarcity (metabolic hallmark of MSI-GC) activate SREBP, which recruits TUT4/7 to silence cholesterol-importing miRNAs (LDLR-regulating miRs), creating a feedback loop that primes resistance to standard chemotherapy?
TUT4_7-5.Why now: MSI-gastric cancer is Sheldon's clinical focus; SREBP–miRNA crosstalk is emerging but unmapped to uridylation; cholesterol metabolism is his signaling strength; MSI tumors have distinct metabolic dependencies—organoids enable functional testing.
TUT4_7-5.连接你的研究: Gastric cancer/MSI model (hands-on), cholesterol/SREBP signaling (strength), TUT4/7 substrate selectivity (gap), gastric organoids (technique). Therapeutic angle: blocking uridylation to restore chemosensitivity.

AGO2-1.方向标题: AGO2-dependent tRNA-fragment biogenesis in metabolic stress
AGO2-1.核心问题: Does acute lactate-driven or energy-stress signaling through AMPK trigger AGO2-dependent angiogenin cleavage and tRF loading, and how do these tRFs repress glycolytic enzymes to establish a feed-forward metabolic brake?
AGO2-1.Why now: tRF biogenesis mechanisms remain incompletely understood (explicit gap); lactate signaling expertise + small-RNA-seq capacity allow direct proof-of-concept in T2D pig model where AMPK activation is tractable; angiogenin-AGO2 interaction is biochemically addressable with TRBP/DGCR8 reagents.
AGO2-1.连接你的研究: T2D pig model + lactate/AMPK metabolism signaling + small-RNA-seq + organoid readouts (islet or hepatic). Positions tRF as metabolic rheostat, not just cancer marker.

DROSHA-1.方向标题: Lactate-driven DROSHA instability in metabolic inflammation and IBD
DROSHA-1.核心问题: Does lactate-induced lactylation of DROSHA or DGCR8 destabilize the Microprocessor complex, suppressing miRNA maturation in intestinal epithelial fibrosis?
DROSHA-1.Why now: Lactylation is newly characterized as a histone-independent signaling node; Lai lab has DGCR8/TRBP tooling; SAA3-driven IBD model shows lactate elevation in fibrotic lesions—direct biochemical link untested.
DROSHA-1.连接你的研究: Uses intestinal organoids + IBD/SAA3-fibrosis model + lactate/lactylation metabolism expertise; DGCR8 constructs in hand; disease-relevant epithelial-stromal signaling axis.

TARBP2-1.方向标题: TRBP-mediated lactate-responsive miRNA rewiring in T2D
TARBP2-1.核心问题: Does lactate accumulation in T2D suppress TRBP–DGCR8 complex formation, shifting pre-miRNA processing toward DICER-independent degradation pathways and driving metabolic inflammation?
TARBP2-1.Why now: Lactylation as chromatin/protein PTM now mainstream (2020+); Lai-lab has TRBP/DGCR8 tools; T2D pig model phenotyped for lactate dysmetabolism; single-cell RNA-seq enables tracking miRNA biogenesis intermediates in metabolic tissues.
TARBP2-1.连接你的研究: Uses T2D pig model + lactate/AMPK signaling expertise + Lai-lab TRBP/DGCR8 constructs; intestinal organoids model glucose–lactate crosstalk in enterocytes.

TUT4_7-6.方向标题: Cardiac fibrosis checkpoint: MYBPC3-bound miRNAs resist uridylation-driven turnover via secondary-structure shielding
TUT4_7-6.核心问题: Do MYBPC3 mutations impair structural complementarity with regulatory miRNAs, exposing 3′ ends to TUT4/7 but sequestering degradation products away from DIS3L2, fueling chronic fibrotic inflammation?
TUT4_7-6.Why now: MYBPC3-HCM is a well-characterized genetic model in his hands; miRNA–protein structural coupling in turnover is understudied; base editing now allows precise rescue mutations in patient iPSC cardiomyocytes; no prior work on protein-secondary-structure gating of tailing.
TUT4_7-6.连接你的研究: MYBPC3 cardiac hypertrophy/fibrosis model (hands-on), base editing (technique), spatio-temporal uridylation specificity (gap), mechanistic + structural angle (bridges his strength/weakness boundary).

DROSHA-3.方向标题: DROSHA degradation via cholesterol-dependent ubiquitination in DMD muscle fibrosis
DROSHA-3.核心问题: Does aberrant cholesterol accumulation in dystrophic muscle impair TRBP-mediated stabilization of DROSHA, driving miRNA processing collapse and fibro-inflammatory progression in DMD?
DROSHA-3.Why now: Cholesterol dysregulation is newly implicated in DMD pathology (lipid-droplet accumulation in dystrophic fibers); TRBP is known DROSHA-stabilizing partner; DMD pig model directly available.
DROSHA-3.连接你的研究: Leverages DMD pig model + base editing to perturb cholesterol-sensing E3-ligase axis; uses TRBP/DROSHA constructs to test stabilization rescue; small-RNA-seq on dystrophic vs. treated muscle.

DGCR8-2.方向标题: DGCR8 SUMOylation-dependent miRNA cluster licensing in cardiac fibrosis
DGCR8-2.核心问题: Does DGCR8 SUMOylation at stress-responsive lysines gate co-processing of fibrotic miRNA clusters (e.g., miR-29 family) and how does this mechanism fail in MYBPC3-driven hypertrophy?
DGCR8-2.Why now: SUMOylation PTM detection and anti-SUMO proteases (SENPs) are well-characterized reagent-wise; clustered miRNA feedback control is identified as an explicit gap; cardiac fibrosis-miRNA links are deep but DGCR8 post-translational control is absent from the literature.
DGCR8-2.连接你的研究: MYBPC3 cardiac fibrosis/hypertrophy model (mouse or pig), miRNA-seq capability, DGCR8 constructs (wild-type vs. SUMO-null lysine mutants), base-editing to tag endogenous DGCR8 for PTM tracking.

AGO2-6.方向标题: DMD muscle AGO2 phosphorylation states and miRNA stability windows
AGO2-6.核心问题: During Duchenne muscular dystrophy progression, does dysregulated AMPK-AGO2 phosphorylation alter miRNA half-life and loading kinetics to skew muscle-regeneration miRNAs toward decay, and can chemically-stabilized AGO2 phosphomimetics restore regenerative capacity in DMD organoid models?
AGO2-6.Why now: AGO loading kinetics and temporal dynamics of miRNA interactions are explicitly open (gap); DMD model in-hand; AMPK-lactate signaling expertise + phospho-proteomics readiness; organoid platform enables direct readout of myogenic differentiation and miRNA target engagement.
AGO2-6.连接你的研究: DMD disease model + AMPK/lactate/energy-stress signaling + small-RNA-seq + muscle organoid differentiation readouts. Bridges metabolism to muscle pathology.

XPO5-1.方向标题: XPO5-lactylation axis drives miRNA export dysregulation in metabolic disease
XPO5-1.核心问题: Does lactate-driven histone/protein lactylation impair XPO5 function and pre-miRNA export, and can this explain miRNA biogenesis collapse in T2D and obesity?
XPO5-1.Why now: Lactylation has emerged as a metabolic rheostat (2021–2024); XPO5 PTMs remain uncharacterized; Sheldon has hands-on T2D pig model and lactate-signaling expertise to directly test whether lactate flux suppresses nuclear export machinery.
XPO5-1.连接你的研究: T2D pig model (in-hand); lactate/lactylation metabolism (core expertise); uses Lai-lab Ago/TRBP constructs to measure miRNA export capacity in metabolically stressed intestinal organoids.

ZSWIM8-2.方向标题: ZSWIM8-dependent miRNA liberation and nuclease mapping in circulation vs. gut lumen
ZSWIM8-2.核心问题: Do distinct circulating and luminal nucleases (XRN1, DIS3L2, PMR1 candidates) selectively degrade liberated miRNAs post-TDMD, and is this compartmentalization exploitable as a disease biomarker or therapeutic target in T2D and gastric cancer?
ZSWIM8-2.Why now: Nuclease knockouts are routine; his organoid + in-vivo pig models enable sampling both compartments simultaneously (feces, plasma, tissue lysates); prior reviews name nuclease identity as the *single* most urgent gap; no study maps spatial nuclease activity in TDMD.
ZSWIM8-2.连接你的研究: Capitalizes on his pig-model access (T2D, gastric cancer) and organoid skills; compartment-specific degradation is physiologically relevant to his disease foci; nuclease knockdown/inhibition are tractable molecular interventions.

TARBP2-5.方向标题: TRBP as immunopoietic hub: miRNA rewiring in MSI gastric cancer and virus-host dynamics
TARBP2-5.核心问题: Do MSI-induced frame-shift mutations in TRBP or its regulatory partners (PACT, DDX3) skew miRNA biogenesis toward tumor-permissive or viral-replication-supporting miRNA ratios, and can selective base editing of TRBP restore canonical miRNA maturation in gastric cancer and CSFV-infected epithelial cells?
TARBP2-5.Why now: MSI + neoantigens + tumor miRNA dysregulation hotly studied (2020+); CSFV model in swine provides controlled virus-host setting; small-RNA-seq + organoid systems enable rapid iteration; frame-shift mutations in RNA-binding domains are under-explored mechanistically.
TARBP2-5.连接你的研究: Gastric cancer (MSI) model + CSFV virus-host expertise; both use intestinal organoids; small-RNA-seq + base editing to dissect TRBP-driven miRNA shifts; connects to his broader interest in disease initiation via RNA dysregulation.

DROSHA-2.方向标题: AMPK-regulated clustering of Microprocessor in energy stress cardiomyopathy
DROSHA-2.核心问题: Does AMPK-catalyzed phosphorylation of DROSHA promote liquid–liquid phase separation of Microprocessor, altering miRNA maturation selectivity in glucose-starved cardiac hypertrophy?
DROSHA-2.Why now: AMPK-driven LLPS is emerging as an energy-sensing mechanism (recent 2023–2024 literature); MYBPC3 cardiac fibrosis/hypertrophy model exhibits energy insufficiency; miRNA-seq + base editing tools available.
DROSHA-2.连接你的研究: Integrates AMPK/energy-stress metabolism + MYBPC3 cardiomyopathy model; uses small-RNA-seq to map stress-responsive miRNA clusters; mechanistic link between AMPK signaling and Microprocessor dynamics.

XPO5-2.方向标题: AMPK-XPO5 checkpoint suppresses export of decay-prone pre-miRNAs in energy stress
XPO5-2.核心问题: Does AMPK phosphorylate XPO5 or its cofactors (RAN-GTP, Ran-BP1) to selectively gate export of structurally unstable pre-miRNAs during metabolic stress, and can this explain differential miRNA loss in DMD and cardiac fibrosis?
XPO5-2.Why now: AMPK is a master energy sensor; XPO5 regulation by kinases is unmapped; DMD and MYBPC3-fibrosis models both involve energy crisis—Sheldon can use base editing to create phospho-null XPO5 and measure selective pre-miRNA export in organoid stress paradigms.
XPO5-2.连接你的研究: DMD and cardiac (MYBPC3) fibrosis disease models (hands-on); AMPK signaling expertise; base/prime editing capability; intestinal & cardiac organoid systems.

DGCR8-4.方向标题: Cholesterol-dependent DGCR8 misfolding in MSI gastric cancer
DGCR8-4.核心问题: Do aberrant cholesterol biosynthesis and oxysterol accumulation in MSI-high gastric cancers promote DGCR8 aggregation and dominant-negative sequestration of TRBP, shifting miRNA specificity toward pro-tumoral clusters?
DGCR8-4.Why now: Cholesterol/oxysterol effects on protein folding are newly druggable (LXR agonists, sterol-transport inhibitors); MSI gastric cancers show extreme metabolic derangement; DGCR8–TRBP assembly dynamics are known but metabolite-driven misfolding is unexplored; gastric cancer patient samples are accessible via MSKCC.
DGCR8-4.连接你的研究: Gastric cancer disease model + patient material access, cholesterol/metabolism expertise, DGCR8 & TRBP constructs for co-IP assembly assays, small-RNA-seq to track miRNA cluster dysregulation in human tumors.

AGO2-2.方向标题: Nuclear AGO2-miRNA enhancer loading in cardiac hypertrophy memory
AGO2-2.核心问题: During MYBPC3-driven cardiac fibrosis, does sustained nuclear AGO2 occupancy at metabolic-stress enhancers (AMPK, lactylation targets) establish and maintain a hypertrophic chromatin state, and can base editing of AGO2-miRNA interaction domains reverse disease-memory?
AGO2-2.Why now: Nuclear AGO2 enhancer activation is known but selectivity principles lack definition (explicit gap); Lai lab has miRNA-biogenesis constructs to track AGO2 dynamics; MYBPC3 model is in-hand; prime/base editing tools now enable perturbation of AGO2 NLS or miRNA-binding surface.
AGO2-2.连接你的研究: MYBPC3 cardiac fibrosis model + lactate/cholesterol signaling + base editing expertise + nuclear AGO constructs. Bridges structural AGO biology to a clear disease phenotype.

ZSWIM8-5.方向标题: MSI gastric cancer: TDMD-liberated oncomiR recycling as immunotherapy synergy
ZSWIM8-5.核心问题: In MSI gastric cancer, does ZSWIM8-mediated degradation of mismatch-repair-sensitizing or immune-checkpoint miRNAs occur at immunologically cold sites, and can TDMD inhibition re-sensitize tumors to checkpoint blockade?
ZSWIM8-5.Why now: MSI tumors accumulate neoepitopes—gastric cancer is his model; immune-checkpoint miRNA biology is mature (miR-155, miR-146a, others); TDMD as a tumor-intrinsic brake on immune miRNA turnover is untested; CRISPR-based ZSWIM8 editing is feasible in cancer organoids.
ZSWIM8-5.连接你的研究: Anchored to gastric cancer model he has worked with; leverages organoid differentiation skills; connects metabolism (energy stress in tumors modulates ZSWIM8 activity) to immunotherapy—positioning translational impact; mechanism is depth-oriented not phenotype-fishing.

DROSHA-6.方向标题: Post-translational DROSHA acetylation and glucose-sensing in T2D insulin resistance
DROSHA-6.核心问题: Does p300-catalyzed DROSHA acetylation couple glucose-sensing to miRNA maturation, and does T2D-associated loss of this modification suppress miRNA-driven metabolic remodeling in adipose/liver tissue?
DROSHA-6.Why now: Acetylation emerges as glucose-sensor (recent 2023–2024 mechanistic work); T2D pig model exhibits impaired glucose-responsive miRNA networks; reversible PTM link to glycolytic shift is unexplored.
DROSHA-6.连接你的研究: Uses T2D pig model + organoid-derived adipocytes/hepatocytes; DGCR8/AGO constructs to test acetylation-rescue of miRNA maturation; small-RNA-seq to map glucose-responsive miRNA clusters; integrates metabolism signaling expertise.

TUT4_7-4.方向标题: CSFV evasion via hijacking miRNA stability and uridylation in epithelial barriers
TUT4_7-4.核心问题: Does classical swine fever virus trigger TUT4/7-mediated monouridylation (not degradation) of host miRNAs that repress innate-immune targets, and can selective DIS3L2 activation restore antiviral miRNA decay?
TUT4_7-4.Why now: CSFV is a major swine pathogen; viral host-shutoff mechanisms are understudied at the miRNA level; monouridylation-versus-oligouridylation branch-point is an explicit gap; Sheldon has CSFV-infected intestinal cultures.
TUT4_7-4.连接你的研究: CSFV virus-host model (hands-on), intestinal epithelial biology, miRNA turnover regulation (factor), small-RNA-seq (technique). Connects to Asian swine-disease relevance (fellowship alignment).

DGCR8-1.方向标题: Lactylation-driven DGCR8 stabilization in metabolic disease
DGCR8-1.核心问题: Does lactate-dependent histone lactylation signal through chromatin remodelers to stabilize DGCR8 protein and reprogram miRNA biogenesis in T2D and metabolic stress states?
DGCR8-1.Why now: Lactylation PTM mechanisms are newly tractable via selective inhibitors (e.g., LDH antagonists); Sheldon has direct T2D pig tissue access and Lai-lab DGCR8 tools; lactate signaling in immune/metabolic disease is mainstream but PTM crosstalk to miRNA processing is unmapped.
DGCR8-1.连接你的研究: T2D pig model (tissue access), lactate/metabolic signaling expertise, DGCR8 constructs for overexpression/binding studies, intestinal organoids for glucose-stress miRNA profiling.

DROSHA-5.方向标题: Mismatch-repair-driven miRNA-processing errors in MSI gastric cancer
DROSHA-5.核心问题: Do microsatellite-repeat expansions in DROSHA or DGCR8 introns or regulatory regions impair splicing or Microprocessor assembly in MSI-high gastric cancer, reshaping miRNA maturation selectivity?
DROSHA-5.Why now: MSI tumors exhibit 10–100× mutation rates in repetitive DNA; DROSHA/DGCR8 regulatory regions unstudied in MSI context; gastric cancer MSI model in hand; mechanism links DNA-repair deficiency to miRNA-biogenesis bottleneck.
DROSHA-5.连接你的研究: Integrates gastric cancer MSI model + prime/base editing to model repeat-expansion mutations; uses small-RNA-seq to profile MSI vs. MSS miRNA maturation landscapes; mechanistic bridge to tumor suppression.

XPO5-3.方向标题: Tissue-specific XPO5 expression and polymorphism burden in IBD-driven intestinal fibrosis
XPO5-3.核心问题: Are XPO5 SNPs (especially rs11077) enriched in IBD cohorts, and does reduced XPO5 capacity in intestinal epithelial cells selectively impair export of miRNAs that suppress SAA3 and fibrogenic signaling?
XPO5-3.Why now: XPO5 rs11077 functional validation is explicitly a gap; Sheldon has SAA3-driven IBD/fibrosis model in hand; small-RNA-seq infrastructure (Lai lab) allows tissue-specific profiling of export-competent vs. retained pre-miRNAs in inflamed intestine.
XPO5-3.连接你的研究: IBD/SAA3 fibrosis model (established); small-RNA-seq expertise; intestinal organoid platform; directly amenable to GWAS-to-mechanism translation.

ZSWIM8-4.方向标题: Trigger-RNA discovery in virus-host miRNA silencing (CSFV, IAV model)
ZSWIM8-4.核心问题: Does classical swine fever or influenza virus replication produce or expose cryptic trigger RNAs that reprogram ZSWIM8-AGO2 turnover, enabling viral immune evasion and can viral-miRNA stability be therapeutically restored?
ZSWIM8-4.Why now: CSFV is his established hands-on system; trigger-RNA discovery remains largely ad-hoc (review noted this gap); viral RNA structure is interrogable by new sequencing (vsCLAP, structured RNAseq); TRBP/DGCR8 reagents from his lab are ideal for mechanistic work.
ZSWIM8-4.连接你的研究: Exploits virus-host system he has worked with; uses Lai-lab small-RNA and miRNA-biogenesis reagents directly; trigger-RNA discovery fills an explicit gap while staying in his wheelhouse (TRBP, DGCR8 constructs he knows).

AGO2-4.方向标题: AGO2 kinetic tuning of miRNA-decay vs. silencing in MSI-gastric cancer
AGO2-4.核心问题: In microsatellite-instable gastric tumors, do mutations in AGO2-miRNA binding kinetics or AGO2-XRN1/DCP1A recruitment shift the cellular decision from target-mediated decay (tMD, tumor-suppressive) to canonical silencing (tumor-permissive), and can synthetic AGO2 variants restore decay-dominance?
AGO2-4.Why now: Quantitative requirements for tMD vs. silencing kinetics are explicitly unresolved (gap); gastric cancer model in-hand; base editing can install kinetically-altered AGO2 alleles; small-RNA-seq directly measures miRNA levels (decay vs. silencing readout).
AGO2-4.连接你的研究: Gastric cancer (MSI) model + small-RNA-seq + base editing + molecular mechanism deep-dive. Links AGO2 structural biology to tumor suppression.

XPO5-6.方向标题: Cholesterol-XPO5 feedback: nuclear-membrane stiffening suppresses miRNA export and licenses senescence in aging
XPO5-6.核心问题: Does accumulated cholesterol rigidify the nuclear envelope and impair RAN-GTP recycling through XPO5, and can cholesterol-lowering or XPO5 overexpression extend healthspan by restoring senescence-suppressive miRNA export in aged tissue?
XPO5-6.Why now: Aging is an explicit gap (nucleocytoplasmic transport and senescence link remains incompletely understood); cholesterol metabolism is Sheldon's unfair advantage; organoid aging models are now tractable—he can measure XPO5-mediated export in chronologically aged intestinal epithelium.

XPO5-5.方向标题: CSFV-induced XPO5 antagonism: viral proteases dismantle miRNA export to suppress interferon response
XPO5-5.核心问题: Does classical swine fever virus directly proteolyze or sequester XPO5/RAN, and does pharmacological XPO5 stabilization restore interferon-responsive miRNA export and viral control in porcine intestinal epithelium?
XPO5-5.Why now: Virus–host XPO5 antagonism is a gap in the literature; Sheldon has CSFV expertise and access to infected animal models; small-RNA-seq during infection can map export-competent pre-miRNAs in antiviral response.
XPO5-5.连接你的研究: CSFV virus-host model (established); porcine intestinal tissue & organoids; small-RNA-seq viral-infection time courses; direct link to Lai-lab antiviral-miRNA network.

XPO5-4.方向标题: XPO5-tailing enzyme coupling: UPF1/SMG6 remodel pre-miRNA 3' ends to modulate export efficiency
XPO5-4.核心问题: Do tailing enzymes (TUT4, TUT7, PNPase) phosphorylate or interact with XPO5 to couple 3' end remodeling with nuclear export decisions, and does dysregulation of this axis suppress let-7 export in gastric cancer and MSI contexts?
XPO5-4.Why now: TUT4/7 are mechanistically under-crowded (10–15 papers/yr vs. 50+ for AGO2); XPO5–tailing enzyme crosstalk is unmapped; MSI gastric-cancer model exhibits let-7 dysregulation—Sheldon can use base editing to decouple tailing from export and measure cancer phenotypes.
XPO5-4.连接你的研究: Gastric cancer & MSI model (hands-on); base/prime editing for XPO5–tailing-enzyme interaction mutations; small-RNA-seq to track let-7 maturation landscape; biochemistry PhD strength in mechanism.

DGCR8-6.方向标题: Viral DGCR8 hijacking and immune miRNA dysregulation in CSFV infection
DGCR8-6.核心问题: Do CSFV-encoded proteases cleave or sequester DGCR8, and does immune-miRNA biogenesis collapse drive the paradoxical pro-viral intestinal immune tolerance in classical swine fever?
DGCR8-6.Why now: CSFV proteolysis & immune escape mechanisms are well-characterized; miRNA-dependent antiviral immunity is mainstream; but DGCR8-level viral antagonism is unmapped; Sheldon has CSFV-infected pigs and intestinal-viral pathology expertise; organoids can model epithelial+immune miRNA circuits.
DGCR8-6.连接你的研究: CSFV virus-host model (infected tissue access), intestinal organoids (epithelial + immune co-culture), small-RNA-seq in infected vs. control, DGCR8 construct for rescue experiments, understanding immune-dysregulation mechanism.

DGCR8-3.方向标题: Age-dependent DGCR8 acetylation and miRNA replenishment in 22q11DS organoids
DGCR8-3.核心问题: Does developmental DGCR8 haploinsufficiency dysregulate sirtuin-dependent acetylation dynamics, and can temporal DGCR8-replacement (via dual base+prime editing) restore age-appropriate miRNA signatures in human iPSC-derived neural organoids?
DGCR8-3.Why now: 22q11DS temporal windows for intervention are explicitly stated as undefined; base & prime editing now enable precise DGCR8 correction; iPSC organoids and Lai-lab miRNA-biogenesis reagents are in-house; acetylation-SIRT crosstalk in aging is established but miRNA-biogenesis context is virgin.
DGCR8-3.连接你的研究: Base/prime editing expertise, small-RNA-seq pipelines, access to organoid platforms (neuronal differentiation tractable from existing intestinal expertise), DGCR8 haploinsufficiency mechanistic knowledge.

AGO2-5.方向标题: CSFV NS5A hijacking of AGO2-miRNA loading in viral persistence
AGO2-5.核心问题: Does classical swine fever virus NS5A interfere with DICER→AGO2 transfer kinetics or TRBP-mediated RISC maturation to suppress antiviral miRNA function, and can prime editing of AGO2-TRBP contact residues enhance viral restriction in infected epithelial organoids?
AGO2-5.Why now: AGO loading dynamics are incompletely resolved (explicit gap); virus-host CSFV biology and intestinal organoid expertise in-hand; TRBP/DGCR8 reagents available; proof that viral proteases target RISC pathway components exists, but AGO2-kinetic angle is underdeveloped.
AGO2-5.连接你的研究: CSFV virus-host model + intestinal organoids + small-RNA-seq + Lai reagents (TRBP constructs). Mechanistic virology + translational (vaccine/antiviral design).

DROSHA-4.方向标题: Virus-induced DROSHA hijacking and miRNA-silencing escape in CSFV infection
DROSHA-4.核心问题: Does classical swine fever virus encode or recruit proteases that proteolytically inactivate DROSHA or AGO2, disabling host miRNA silencing of viral transcripts and innate-immune regulators?
DROSHA-4.Why now: CSFV hands-on model + expertise; viral DROSHA antagonism precedent exists (HCV NS3 protease, enterovirus 3C); CSFV's temporal proteolytic cascade not mapped against Microprocessor—direct mechanistic gap.
DROSHA-4.连接你的研究: Uses CSFV-infected organoids/cells + base editing of candidate protease targets; Lai-lab AGO constructs for silencing-rescue assays; small-RNA-seq to detect viral escape-associated miRNA dysregulation.
